description: Effortlessly Transition to Cashless Shopping with our Eco-Friendly Trolley Tokens - Our 20-pack of plastic trolley tokens is the ultimate solution for convenient, cash-free access to supermarket trolleys and lockers. Made from recycled plastics using advanced FDM technology, these durable, eco-friendly tokens are designed for the environmentally conscious shopper. Perfectly sized to mimic the modern 12-sided pound coin, they fit seamlessly into all shopping carts, ensuring a smooth shopping experience. Key Features: Cashless Convenience: Say goodbye to the hassle of finding a pound coin. Our trolley tokens make it easy to access supermarket trolleys and lockers anytime. Universal Fit for Shopping Carts: Our tokens are meticulously designed to fit any supermarket trolley, offering a hassle-free shopping experience. Sustainable and Lightweight: Made from recycled plastics, these tokens are lightweight yet sturdy, reducing plastic waste and promoting environmental sustainability. Handy Keychain Clip: Each token comes with a convenient clip, making it easy to attach to your car keys and keep your shopping essentials organized. Great Gift Idea: With 20 tokens per pack, this set is ideal for sharing with family and friends or keeping as handy spares. Ideal for shoppers looking to minimize their environmental impact while enjoying the convenience of a streamlined shopping experience, our trolley tokens are a must-have accessory. Perfect for eco-conscious shoppers, these tokens not only support sustainable practices but also offer practical utility and ease of use.
